title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation Â· Invariant Recall
summary: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a strongly-connected dependency report after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use discovery and finish structure to reason about directed reachability.
Compute strongly connected components and validate mutual reachability within each result.
Collapse strong components into an acyclic condensation graph.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
